issues.description: Effect array is empty. Card has On Play trigger with significant board lock effect that must be encoded. Should prevent up to 1 opponent's rested Character (cost ≤3) from becoming active during opponent's next Refresh Phase.

suggestedDsl.effectText: [On Play] Up to 1 of your opponent's rested Characters with a cost of 3 or less will not become active in your opponent's next Refresh Phase.
